user.title: Connect to your Habity bedside clock
user.description: Enter the local IP address of your Habity bedside clock. Make sure it's on the same network as Home Assistant.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the device. Check the IP address and make sure the clock is connected to power.
error.timeout: Connection timed out. The device did not respond in time.
error.invalid_response: The device responded but the data looks wrong. Make sure it's running the correct firmware.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check your Home Assistant logs for details.

abort.already_configured: This Habity bedside clock is already configured.
